# icon4


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

The viz slot is a full-size **iframe** loading the URL from
`ST_JUPYTER_LAB_URL` (see `therapy_config.jupyter_lab_link_url()`).
Jupyter Server must allow embedding (e.g. CSP `frame-ancestors`
including your app origin).
**[`append_chat_turn_to_notebook`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#append_chat_turn_to_notebook)**
uses the REST API as before.

## Constants

`ICON_ID` identifies this slot for routing or logging.
`SESSION_NOTEBOOK_KEY` is where the FastHTML session stores the
**relative path** of the notebook file Lab should open
(e.g. `my_notes.ipynb` or a path under the server root).

## Jupyter path helpers

**[`ensure_icon4_sid`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#ensure_icon4_sid)**
hands chat
([`lisette_chat`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/lisette.html#lisette_chat))
a stable id per browser session.
**[`default_notebook_path`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#default_notebook_path)**
picks the file when nothing is stored yet (`JUPYTER_NOTEBOOK_PATH` or
`my_notes.ipynb`).
**[`_contents_api_url`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#_contents_api_url)**
is the REST base for reading/writing notebook JSON.

**[`resolve_notebook_path`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#resolve_notebook_path)**
prefers a safe, non-traversal `notebook` query string when present, then
the session value, then the default.
**[`session_notebook_path`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#session_notebook_path)**
is “current path” without a request override.

## Jupyter Lab iframe (HTMX out-of-band)

**[`lab_iframe_src()`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#lab_iframe_src)**
is exactly **`ST_JUPYTER_LAB_URL`**.
**[`jupyter_wrap_oob`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#jupyter_wrap_oob)**
replaces **`#jupyter-wrap`** (`hx_swap_oob`).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/alix559/string_therapy/blob/main/string_therapy/icon4.py#L96"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

``` python

def jupyter_wrap_oob(
    session:dict, cache_bust:str | None=None
)->Div:

```

*OOB fragment: replaces \#jupyter-wrap with the Lab iframe.*

unchanged.

## Appending chat turns to the notebook (Jupyter Server API)

**[`append_chat_turn_to_notebook`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#append_chat_turn_to_notebook)**
is **async**: it GETs the notebook document from
**[`_contents_api_url`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#_contents_api_url)**,
parses it with **nbformat**, appends cells, then PUTs the updated JSON.
Callers (e.g. **`app.py`**) use this after
**[`chat`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon4.html#chat)**
returns; refresh the notebook in Jupyter Lab to see new cells.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/alix559/string_therapy/blob/main/string_therapy/icon4.py#L143"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### append_chat_turn_to_notebook

``` python

async def append_chat_turn_to_notebook(
    notebook_path:str, user_message:str, reply_cell_type:str, assistant_text:str | None
)->tuple[bool, str]:

```

*Append user prompt as markdown, then assistant reply as markdown or
code (one GET + one PUT).*

## Routes

**[`register_routes`](https://alix559.github.io/string_therapy/icon1.html#register_routes)**
attaches **`GET /icon4/jupyter-frame`** (iframe fragment + session
notebook path).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/alix559/string_therapy/blob/main/string_therapy/icon1.py#L147"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
